description: Baseline recipe for top-down cobblestone raw material. Tile Studio will become fully wired in a later milestone.
prompt_template: top-down pixel art game tile, seamless repeating texture, orthographic view, flat lighting, crisp pixels, limited color palette, {prompt}
negative_prompt: character, person, building, wall, street scene, perspective, horizon, realistic, photorealistic, blurry, smooth shading, anti-aliased, text, watermark, border, frame
